state.description: Debtor Andi has not paid the invoice of 5000 Euro after a reminder was sent.

node_33d290c0.title: Payment Demand Letter Sent to Debtor

state.legal_issue: Payment demand issued and awaiting debtor response
state.description: Plaintiff Timmy has sent a formal payment demand letter to debtor Andi for the overdue invoice of 5000 Euro and awaits payment or response within the legal timeframe.

legal_references.reference: Civil Code - Payment Demands for Overdue Invoices
legal_references.summary: Plaintiff can send a formal payment demand to debtor after invoice due date has expired.

artifacts.content: Formal payment demand letter sent to debtor Andi requesting payment of the overdue invoice of 5000 Euro.

references.reference: Civil Code - Payment Demand Response Period
references.summary: Debtor has 30 days to respond to formal payment demand after receipt.

deadlines.summary: Debtor must pay or respond to payment demand within 30 days.

node_33d290c0.summary: Plaintiff Timmy has issued a formal payment demand to debtor Andi and is awaiting payment or response within 30 days.

node_5ee7d770.title: Complaint Filed for Unpaid Invoice

state.legal_issue: Complaint filed due to unpaid invoice and debtor non-response
state.description: Plaintiff Timmy files a formal complaint against debtor Andi with the court after failed payment demands.

legal_references.summary: Debtor is in default if payment is not made after reminder.
Plaintiff may file a complaint in court if payment is overdue and reminder ineffective.

artifacts.content: Formal complaint filed by Timmy against Andi for unpaid invoice of 5000 Euro.

references.summary: The court may set deadlines for responses to the complaint.

deadlines.summary: Deadline for debtor Andi to respond to the complaint.

node_5ee7d770.summary: Plaintiff Timmy files a formal complaint against debtor Andi at the court seeking payment of the overdue invoice after previous payment demands failed.

node_619293eb.title: Settlement Offer Made

state.legal_issue: Settlement offer for overdue payment submitted
state.description: Plaintiff Timmy has made an offer to debtor Andi to settle the invoice debt partially or fully through negotiation.

legal_references.reference: Principle of contractual freedom and amicable settlement
legal_references.summary: Parties may negotiate and settle outstanding payment disputes amicably before court proceedings.

artifacts.content: Settlement offer letter proposing partial payment of 3000 Euro to settle the debt of 5000 Euro.

references.reference: Customary 30-day response period for settlement offer
references.summary: The debtor has a customary 30-day period to respond to a settlement offer before further legal action.

deadlines.summary: Debtor Andi has 30 days to respond to the settlement offer.

node_619293eb.summary: Plaintiff Timmy offers debtor Andi a settlement to resolve the overdue invoice debt amicably, allowing Andi 30 days to respond.

artifacts.content: Formal payment demand letter sent to debtor Andi requesting payment of the overdue invoice of 5000 Euro.

conditions: Reminder has been sent and payment deadline passed

legal_references.summary: Plaintiff can send a formal payment demand to debtor after invoice due date has expired.
